topics.title: Sony Pictures Circling Ridley Scott’s Treasure Island Package Starring Hugh Jackman
topics.angle: Sony Pictures is in talks to acquire Ridley Scott's Treasure Island package starring Hugh Jackman.

sources.headline: Sony Pictures Circling Ridley Scott s Treasure Island Package Starring Hugh Jackman
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: After setting sell with their hot Treasure Island package last month, Ridley Scott and Hugh Jackman look to have found the film a place to call home as sources tell Deadline Sony Pictures is in negotiations to land the project with Scott directing and Jackman on board to play the pirate Blackbeard. Jack Thorne [ ]

topics.title: Days of Thunder 2 : Jonathan Levine in Talks to Direct Tom Cruise in Paramount Sequel
topics.angle: Jonathan Levine is in talks to direct Tom Cruise in Paramount's sequel to Days of Thunder.

sources.headline: Days of Thunder 2 : Jonathan Levine in Talks to Direct Tom Cruise in Paramount Sequel
sources.summary: Paramount s Days of Thunder sequel is shaping up with Jonathan Levine ( 50/50, Warm Bodies ) in negotiations to direct returning star Tom Cruise. Cruise will also produce the film alongside Jerry Bruckheimer, who produced the original 1990 racing drama. Will Staples wrote the script for the sequel. Days of Thunder was directed by the late Tony [ ]

topics.title: Kenan Thompson, Vanessa Bayer Among Voice Cast for 'Family Guy' Spinoff 'Stewie'

sources.headline: Stewie Voice Cast Set: Kenan Thompson, Vanessa Bayer, Melissa O’Neil, Mike Henry More Join Seth MacFarlane In Family Guy Spinoff
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Fox, Hulu and 20th Television Animation have assembled the voice cast of the upcoming Family Guy spinoff Stewie, which includes titular star Seth MacFarlane pulling a double voiceover duty and Mike Henry voicing someone related to one of his signature Family Guy characters. SNL-ers Kenan Thompson and Vanessa Bayer, The Rookie star Melissa O’Neil [ ]

sources.headline: Kenneth Branagh to Star in Paramount+ Drama Laird Set in Scottish Highlands
sources.summary: Paramount+ has picked up the drama series Laird with Kenneth Branagh attached in the lead role.
